experience.title: Mobile App Developer
experience.company: GridSync—Industry Project with MSEDCL (Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Co. Ltd.)
responsibilities: Built GridSync—a cross-platform Flutter/Dart mobile application for MSEDCL to digitize transformer maintenance across Maharashtra; replaced manual paper-based records with a centralized real-time system.

Implemented role-based access (Admin & Technician), automated maintenance scheduling (90/180/365-day cycles), photo proof logging, and overdue alerts via Firebase FCM—delivered to a real government utility client.
outcomes: Digitized transformer maintenance across Maharashtra, replacing manual paper-based records with a centralized real-time system.
Delivered to a real government utility client.

projects.title: CREDIX—AI Pre-Delinquency Risk Platform
projects.description: Built an end-to-end FinTech AI platform predicting customer Probability of Default 2–4 weeks before missed payment using a 4-model ensemble (XGBoost, LightGBM, RF, Logistic Regression) stacked via meta-learner. Engineered 55+ behavioral features via Feast Feature Store with rolling 30/60-day windows; tracked with MLflow; streamed data via Apache Kafka and Airflow. Deployed 5 role-based Plotly Dash dashboards with SHAP explainability per customer and automated Twilio SMS/email alerts for high-risk segments.

projects.title: Accident Severity Prediction
projects.description: Benchmarked 5 ensemble models with SMOTE class balancing. End-to-end pipeline: EDA, preprocessing, feature encoding, F1/precision-recall evaluation.
projects.outcome: Best: 99.20% accuracy (C SEV, RF) and 71.79% (P ISEV, Stacking).

projects.title: Intellectus—Student Risk Analysis System
projects.description: scikit-learn classification model with FastAPI REST API backend and React (Vite) dashboard, centralizing student risk insights for educators.
